howItWorks.intro: This deck stain calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Stain
rules.explanation: Total area times coats divided by coverage rate.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: How much does deck stain cover?
faq.a: Most deck stains cover 200-300 sq ft per gallon.

faq.q: How often to restain a deck?
faq.a: Every 2-3 years for transparent stain, 3-5 for solid stain.
